steps: Each tray holds at least 50 and at most 60 cookies.
With 4 trays, the minimum total is 4 × 50 = 200 and the maximum is 4 × 60 = 240.
Any valid answer must satisfy 200 ≤ total ≤ 240.
Check each choice against this range.
eliminationHtml:
• Choice A — '165': 165 < 200, below the minimum possible total. ✗
  • Choice B — '205': 200 ≤ 205 ≤ 240, achievable (e.g., three trays of 50 and one of 55). ✓
  • Choice C — '245': 245 > 240, above the maximum possible total. ✗
  • Choice D — '285': 285 > 240, well above the maximum possible total. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
